goal: Onboard Aedra Realty, add tenants Mary Atieno/John Mwangi, and generate report.

requests.message: Create company admin for Aedra Realty called Peter Otieno.
Create new tenants: Mary Atieno, John Mwangi under Aedra Realty.
Assign units E5 and D10 to Mary Atieno and John Mwangi respectively.
Update rent for unit E5 to 35000 and unit D10 to 22000.
Generate monthly rent report for Aedra Realty.
Notify Mary Atieno and John Mwangi about their new rent amounts via WhatsApp.

goal: Investigate deletion of Fatuma Ali by Fatuma Ali and restore data.

requests.message: Show audit logs for user Fatuma Ali from last week.
Filter logs for any delete operations in Lakeside Realty.
Identify who deleted the record for tenant Fatuma Ali.
Recreate the deleted tenant record for Fatuma Ali under Lakeside Realty.
Log a security incident regarding unauthorized deletion by Fatuma Ali.
Send a summary of this investigation to the global security mailbox.

goal: Bulk import and setup properties for Aedra Realty.

requests.message: Import properties for Aedra Realty from properties_batch.csv.
List all units that were created without a landlord assigned.
Bulk assign Peter Otieno as the company admin for all new units in Aedra Realty.
Generate a portfolio summary for Aedra Realty showing total unit count.
Alert me if any property in Aedra Realty has more than 5 vacant units.

goal: Monitor payment compliance and take action on laggards.

requests.message: Show me all companies with more than 10% unpaid tenants this month.
List specific overdue tenants for the top 3 offending companies.
Freeze account access for Homeet Ltd due to compliance failure.
Generate a global compliance report for all property groups.
Schedule a follow-up alert for Monday to check payment status again.

goal: Recover failed transaction TXN196388 and notify user.

requests.message: Identify all failed M-Pesa transactions for today.
Check status of transaction TXN196388 specifically.
Reverse the failed payment TXN196388 and credit the tenant's wallet.
Notify the affected tenant about the reversal for TXN196388.
Generate a system health report focusing on payment gateway stability.
Escalate the gateway timeout issues to the dev team.
